meta.production_fvs_engine_note: Production FVS configuration is recalibrated species-dependent growth with density-dependent gompit mortality (b2_gompit), selected on accuracy, the within-stand mortality effect, and a Bakuzis biological-realism assessment. Evidence DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21027931. The served ensemble represents FVS by this single production member; FVS_default and FVS_calibrated remain available as alternate trajectories.
meta.purpose: Cross-engine scenario crosswalk so libcbm / CEM / LANDIS / yield curves can render on a single comparable (harvest_intensity x climate) axis.
meta.join_strategy: For each engine, list the native scenario codes that map to each axis cell. When ambiguous, prefer the closest-match label; flag axes that an engine does not natively resolve.

libcbm_cross_state_v2.notes: libcbm sit_events drive the harvest axis; climate is separately keyed.

cem_v5_cross_state.notes: CEM has separate wear (harvest pressure) and policy (carbon floor) axes; collapse to harvest_intensity by taking wear OR policy whichever drives the diverging trajectory.

landis_ii_perseus.notes: LANDIS-II factorial supports {none, baseline, increased, perseus} harvest and {baseline, ssp245, ssp585} climate. Owner axis is the factorial dim (ind/nipf/public) when the factorial is fully populated; currently FIA OWNGRPCD is used as proxy.

yield_curves_v4.notes: Chapman-Richards fits are climate-agnostic; only treatment axis varies. Use as historic baseline anchor for the climate dimension.

fvs_recalibrated.notes: FVS uses FIA-anchored re-calibration; native variant codes (ACD/NE/etc) collapsed in the v0.52 harmonization.

unit_crosswalk.note: Use AGB->AGC=0.47 only when engine does not natively report carbon; LANDIS biomass_Mg_ha is AGB live biomass.
